ocr_findings.description: Section header marker '●' rendered as plain bullet in OCR; visual orange dot lost but content preserved

reviewer_notes: Table of computer types (マイクロコンピュータ through スーパーコンピュータ) captured with high fidelity. All 9 rows present with correct names and descriptions. The callout box 'ブレードサーバとは…省スペース化を実現しているサーバ' is correctly included. Page number 377 present. No character-level errors detected.
